---
title: "Outreach"
description: "Outreach and public engagement from the Caravagna Lab"
---

::: {.page-intro}
<p class="eyebrow">Talks & Outreach · Outreach</p>

# Cancer data science beyond the laboratory.

Public engagement, education and activities that make computational oncology more accessible.
:::

::: {.content-note}
**Editorial status:** the scope and initial activities for this page will be defined together.
:::

## Activities

This page may include public lectures, schools, educational material, interviews and community initiatives.
